records.m_Talk_ENG: What are you... doing here?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What are you... doing here?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What are you... doing here?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ludwig.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ludwig.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ludwig.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is my mansion.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is my mansion.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is my mansion.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A nun possessed by an evil spirit... What a dreadful sight.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A nun possessed by an evil spirit... What a dreadful sight.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A nun possessed by an evil spirit... What a dreadful sight.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It seemed like you were struggling with the exorcism, so I took the liberty of finishing the job.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It seemed like you were struggling with the exorcism, so I took the liberty of finishing the job.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It seemed like you were struggling with the exorcism, so I took the liberty of finishing the job.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You... bastard...
records.m_Talk_DEU: You... bastard...
records.m_Talk_FRA: You... bastard...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why are you mad?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why are you mad?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why are you mad?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Weren't you the one who said the nun was possessed?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Weren't you the one who said the nun was possessed?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Weren't you the one who said the nun was possessed?

records.m_Talk_ENG: As the owner of this estate, I couldn't just stand by and watch.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As the owner of this estate, I couldn't just stand by and watch.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As the owner of this estate, I couldn't just stand by and watch.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But you have Corruption Syndrome...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But you have Corruption Syndrome...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But you have Corruption Syndrome...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did you really think I was just waiting for you outside?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did you really think I was just waiting for you outside?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did you really think I was just waiting for you outside?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You had no problem wandering through my mansion, using "exorcism" as an excuse.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You had no problem wandering through my mansion, using "exorcism" as an excuse.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You had no problem wandering through my mansion, using "exorcism" as an excuse.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I simply decided you had crossed the line.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I simply decided you had crossed the line.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I simply decided you had crossed the line.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Fine. I'll admit that was a mistake on my part.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Fine. I'll admit that was a mistake on my part.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Fine. I'll admit that was a mistake on my part.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But then, why is there an Abomination here?
records.m_Talk_DEU: But then, why is there an Abomination here?
records.m_Talk_FRA: But then, why is there an Abomination here?

records.m_Talk_ENG: And why is there also a city inside this mansion?
records.m_Talk_DEU: And why is there also a city inside this mansion?
records.m_Talk_FRA: And why is there also a city inside this mansion?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Asking about a client's private affairs wasn't part of our contract.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Asking about a client's private affairs wasn't part of our contract.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Asking about a client's private affairs wasn't part of our contract.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Cut the crap and talk!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Cut the crap and talk!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Cut the crap and talk!

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's all thanks to you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's all thanks to you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's all thanks to you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You mean... you used my blood?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You mean... you used my blood?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You mean... you used my blood?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Correct.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Correct.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Correct.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The factor in your blood has an exceptionally high manifestation rate.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The factor in your blood has an exceptionally high manifestation rate.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The factor in your blood has an exceptionally high manifestation rate.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thanks to that, I succeeded in recreating the Aberrant Counterside Effect I wanted to study.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thanks to that, I succeeded in recreating the Aberrant Counterside Effect I wanted to study.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thanks to that, I succeeded in recreating the Aberrant Counterside Effect I wanted to study.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then, that corpse I found earlier...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then, that corpse I found earlier...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then, that corpse I found earlier...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. It was one of my test subjects.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. It was one of my test subjects.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. It was one of my test subjects.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A worthless failure, so I disposed of it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A worthless failure, so I disposed of it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A worthless failure, so I disposed of it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why would you even want to research something like the Aberrant Counterside Effect?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why would you even want to research something like the Aberrant Counterside Effect?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why would you even want to research something like the Aberrant Counterside Effect?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you working with the Northern Union?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you working with the Northern Union?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you working with the Northern Union?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did they promise you a fortune beyond your wildest dreams?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did they promise you a fortune beyond your wildest dreams?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did they promise you a fortune beyond your wildest dreams?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Unlike you, I'm not obsessed with money.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Unlike you, I'm not obsessed with money.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Unlike you, I'm not obsessed with money.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Naturally, I rejected their proposal.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Naturally, I rejected their proposal.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Naturally, I rejected their proposal.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Their chimeras are impressive... but not aligned with my goals.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Their chimeras are impressive... but not aligned with my goals.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Their chimeras are impressive... but not aligned with my goals.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then why...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then why...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then why...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I wanted to conquer the Corruption.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I wanted to conquer the Corruption.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I wanted to conquer the Corruption.

records.m_Talk_ENG: After all, I suffer from Corruption Syndrome myself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: After all, I suffer from Corruption Syndrome myself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: After all, I suffer from Corruption Syndrome myself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And how does this help with that?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: And how does this help with that?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: And how does this help with that?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: How impatient.
records.m_Talk_DEU: How impatient.
records.m_Talk_FRA: How impatient.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ideally, I'd sit down for a cup of tea with you and explain everything at a leisurely pace...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ideally, I'd sit down for a cup of tea with you and explain everything at a leisurely pace...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ideally, I'd sit down for a cup of tea with you and explain everything at a leisurely pace...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But I don't have the time for that luxury.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But I don't have the time for that luxury.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But I don't have the time for that luxury.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Then stop wasting time and talk already.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Then stop wasting time and talk already.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Then stop wasting time and talk already.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As you know, Corruption Syndrome is incurable.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As you know, Corruption Syndrome is incurable.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As you know, Corruption Syndrome is incurable.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There was a time when I lost all motivation and simply waited for death.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There was a time when I lost all motivation and simply waited for death.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There was a time when I lost all motivation and simply waited for death.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And then, one day...
records.m_Talk_DEU: And then, one day...
records.m_Talk_FRA: And then, one day...

records.m_Talk_ENG: A light of salvation shone upon me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A light of salvation shone upon me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A light of salvation shone upon me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The legendary potion. The Elixir.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The legendary potion. The Elixir.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The legendary potion. The Elixir.
